headline: With gas prices above $4, drivers across the country grapple with higher costs: “I have to spend it—there’s no other way”

headline: Gas At The Pump Just Hit $4.14 — Biggest Inflation Jump Since 2022 May Be Next
summary: Gas prices hit $4.14, up 39% since the Iran war. BofA sees March CPI +1% — the biggest monthly spike since 2022. What it means for investors.

headline: Treasury yields rise as Trump reiterates Iran infrastructure threat, sending oil higher
